audit_items.proof_trace: `_onAuctionEnd` is an `internal virtual` function with exactly one call site at `performUpkeep::L366`. That call site is unconditionally preceded by the guard at L362 (`if (s_auctionStarts[asset] == 0) revert InvalidAuction(asset)`), and `s_auctionStarts[asset]` is only cleared by `delete` at L367 after `_onAuctionEnd` returns — so the non-zero invariant holds at every call.
